behaviors.description: The review input is scoped to the lines that changed, not the full content of each modified file.
behaviors.justification: Failure appears at module handoff (diff extraction -> review-input builder), not just isolated function logic. Behavior text does not require real network/subprocess/external contract checks, and does not depend on model output quality.
behaviors.test_description: Run the diff-ingestion and review-input assembly path together using realistic patch fixtures plus full file contents; assert only changed hunks/lines are included in review input and unchanged file regions are excluded.
behaviors.plan_consistent_note: This test requires wiring multiple local modules and state handoff; unit-only checks can miss boundary mismatches.

behaviors.description: Inline comments are attached to the correct positions in the diff view on the pull request.
behaviors.justification: This explicitly requires externally visible placement correctness in GitHub’s diff UI/API contract (file/line/side/position semantics). Mocked adapters can hide real API contract mismatches.
behaviors.test_description: Post inline comments to a real test PR via real GitHub API, then read back posted review comments and verify each maps to the expected diff location in that PR (path + line/side/commit context).
behaviors.plan_consistent_note: Requires real external round-trip side-effect verification; lower levels would not prove true diff attachment correctness.

behaviors.description: The agent identifies at least one real defect in a pull request that contains a known introduced bug.
behaviors.justification: Correctness depends on real model judgment (detecting an actual bug), which stubs cannot validate. This is about output quality/decision quality, not only orchestration.
behaviors.test_description: Run the real analysis model on a PR fixture with a known injected defect and score findings against a rubric/ground truth; pass if at least one finding correctly identifies the injected bug.
behaviors.plan_consistent_note: Needs real model behavior; deterministic mocks create false confidence.

behaviors.description: Every finding listed in the top-level summary corresponds to a posted inline comment ID from the same run.
behaviors.justification: This is cross-module consistency (inline-post results -> summary builder) and run-state linkage. Behavior text does not explicitly require real external contract/readback, and does not depend on model output quality.
behaviors.test_description: Execute posting-result aggregation and summary-construction together with run-scoped inline comment IDs; assert each summary finding references an ID returned in that same run and no missing/foreign IDs appear.
behaviors.plan_consistent_note: Primary risk is local orchestration/state handoff, which Integration directly exercises.

behaviors.description: No inline finding is dropped from the final summary payload before posting.
behaviors.justification: This is pipeline completeness across local stages (findings collection -> transform -> summary payload). No explicit real infra or model-quality dependency in the behavior text.
behaviors.test_description: Run the local pipeline from inline findings list through summary payload generation and compare counts/identities to ensure full preservation before post call.
behaviors.plan_consistent_note: Requires multi-module data-flow verification; unit-only tests can miss drop/merge bugs across boundaries.

behaviors.description: The automation sequence (read diff, post inline comments, post summary) succeeds for a real pull request when provided a fixed precomputed finding set.
behaviors.justification: Behavior explicitly requires a real pull request and external side effects (posting comments/summary) with round-trip success, but model output is fixed/precomputed so Agentic is not required.
behaviors.test_description: Against a real test PR, run end-to-end with fixed findings: fetch real diff, post inline comments, post summary comment, then read back PR comments/reviews to verify successful external writes and expected artifacts.
behaviors.plan_consistent_note: Real HTTP/API contracts and visible side effects must be validated; lower levels cannot prove this.

behaviors.description: The full live run with model-generated findings (read diff, analyze, post inline comments, post summary) completes correctly for a real pull request without manual intervention.
behaviors.justification: Requires multiple sequenced steps including real model-dependent analysis and subsequent stateful handoff to posting/summary on a real PR. Pass/fail depends on cross-step consistency of agentic outputs plus external side effects.
behaviors.test_description: Run the full production pipeline on a real test PR using the live model: read diff, generate findings, post inline comments, post summary, then verify completion status plus consistency between generated findings, posted inline artifacts, and final summary.
behaviors.plan_consistent_note: This is a multi-step agent pipeline with model decisions feeding later actions; Agentic-only single-step checks are insufficient.
